title: Tapology ForumsTAPOLOGY’S BADDEST MF’ERS - 2026 - The Saga Continues

posts.author: JPdachamp27
posts.content:
Year two of running the game for me and I'm stoked.

Only changes from last year - No PFL this year and I will now accept entries up to a week late if your screenshot clearly shows your name and not forgery (If late you may not be in the weekly update screenshot but will be added to the next one after).

RULES:
1.To move forward and win in this competition you need points. To get points you need to post your picks of  UFC  events which are running part of the season requests. Picks have to be posted in this thread if you want your points counted.

2.For you to get any points your picked fighter has to win the fight.  Each fighter you predicted correct will be 1 point.For each fighter and round or method you predicted correct is 2 points.Perfect prediction is 3 points (including correctly picking a decision).
3.Your picks have to be posted BETWEEN results/update posts I'll be making after every event. If there's 2+ events in one weekend you are allowed to post all of your picks and not wait for me to post leaderboard. Good example is first week of this 2nd part of the season already.

4.If you'll get caught posting someone's else picks you'll get banned from the season.

5.Full leaderboards of running part of the season and season in general will be posted in end of each month.

Players who got their picks ready for this weekend can start dropping them already. Good luck!

Creator of the game -  Hippie

posts.content: Good luck everyone. This year I'm going for it all

posts.author: Lolitaaa
posts.content:
I have been participating in this competition for the second month in a row and have noticed that the results are gradually improving. Last week, I guessed 4 out of 5 fights correctly, but I didn't get the winning methods right again, even though I tried to look at the analytics before the event. When I have free time between predictions and fighter analysis, I go to PokiesMAN  to play slots. It's convenient because everything is quickly withdrawn via e-wallets without any unnecessary hassle. It helps me take my mind off constantly studying statistics. At UFC 325, I'm betting on Volkanovski in the rematch. He's been looking very good in training lately and is motivated. Hooker vs. Saint-Denis is difficult to predict. Both are in good shape right now and are showing results.

* Edited at 01.29.2026,  6:52 AM ET *

posts.author: JPdachamp27
posts.content: @Lolitaaa make your picks here! Just a fun place for pride and the right to call yourself a BMF, no money on it

posts.content: Saint Denis R2 train 🚂
